name: req_impl_state_guide
description: Nested state guide: outer loop = ordered requirement list (same objects as requirement_list_state_guide); inner loop = fixed agent REQ steps S01 through end_agent_req (same as agent_req_state_guide). First call: pass non-empty requirements; omit current_state. Later calls: current_state = continuation_state only. Sequence per spec: S01…end_agent_req, then next spec. After last spec’s end_agent_req, next call returns end_req_impl (is_end). Composite state field: specId__stepId. Response includes spec (full item) and agent_step (id, title, stage, goals, tasks, outcomes). Run until end_req_impl or error; do not abandon mid-sequence.

requirements.description: Requirement objects in walk order. REQUIRED on first call when current_state is omitted or empty.

current_state.description: Opaque continuation_state from the prior response. When set, requirements is ignored.
